headline: Investors want tokenized Apple stock on the blockchain
summary: Scott Melker discusses investors' push to have tokenized Apple stock traded on the blockchain, Wall Street's latest opposition to DeFi (or decentralized finance), and other top crypto headlines. “The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker” airs on Yahoo Finance every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: GraniteShares Expands Autocallable ETF Lineup with Launch of PLTR and HOOD ETFs

headline: Paul Atkins First Hinted At 'Innovation Exemption' Months Ago, Now The SEC Is Using It To Roll Out A Framework For Tokenized Stocks: Report
summary: The SEC is preparing a framework that would allow trading of tokenized versions of Wall Street-listed stocks, a report said Monday, with the SEC said to be drafting an "innovation exemption."

raw.headline: Paul Atkins First Hinted At 'Innovation Exemption' Months Ago, Now The SEC Is Using It To Roll Out A Framework For Tokenized Stocks: Report
raw.summary: The SEC is preparing a framework that would allow trading of tokenized versions of Wall Street-listed stocks, a report said Monday, with the SEC said to be drafting an "innovation exemption."

headline: Trump’s Crypto Stock Trades Put Robinhood Valuation In Sharper Focus
summary: President Donald Trump disclosed substantial stock trades in crypto related equities, including Robinhood Markets, in recent ethics filings. The filings highlight activity in companies linked to digital assets, bringing fresh attention to NasdaqGS:HOOD and its role in crypto trading. The disclosure places Robinhood in the spotlight at a time when crypto regulation and digital asset platforms remain a key policy discussion. Robinhood Markets, listed on NasdaqGS:HOOD, operates a commission...
